headline.title: AI热潮推动美股创新高，油价因伊朗局势上涨
headline.summary: 受人工智能交易热潮推动，股市升至纪录新高。由于美伊停火协议前景不明，油价随之攀升。
headline.title_en: Stocks Hit Record on AI Rally, Oil Rises on Iran: Markets Wrap
headline.summary_en: Stocks rose to a record as investors doubled down on the artificial intelligence trade that’s powered equities to all-time highs. Oil climbed as a US-Iran ceasefire deal remained elusive.
headline.reason: 该头条兼具AI科技与地缘政治双重主线，反映当日市场核心驱动因素，影响最为广泛。
headline.reason_en: This headline captures the dual drivers of AI technology and geopolitical tension, reflecting the core market movers of the day with broad impact.
